---
title: "Ex.2: Understanding data with AI"
---

{{< include /day1/_ex1-2-overview.qmd >}}

## Common workflow in data analysis with AI

{{< include /methods/_common-workflow-intro.qmd >}}

Before we dive into the example along the workflow, let's cover ways of securing
data first.

## Safeguarding Data {#safeguarding-data}

{{< include /methods/_safeguard-data-overview.qmd >}}

## Example: Understanding data with AI

<!-- TODO -->
